description: User scrolls up on the Explore page to reveal the 'Short tasks' section.
frame_description: The screen moves from 'Sessions to schedule' to show 'Short tasks' at the top.

description: User scrolls horizontally through the 'Short tasks' carousel.
frame_description: The cards under 'Short tasks' shift horizontally, revealing a '$40' card and a 'Survey' card.

description: User continues scrolling through the 'Short tasks' carousel.
frame_description: A 'Survey' card becomes more visible in the 'Short tasks' section.

description: User scrolls further in the 'Short tasks' carousel.
frame_description: A '$25' card appears in the 'Short tasks' section.

description: User scrolls back in the 'Short tasks' carousel.
frame_description: The view shifts back towards the 'Survey' card.
